[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 110100000 3
2 000101100 3
3 010100101 4
4 110100101 5
5 000011100 3
6 010100101 4
7 010101101 5
